title: Six Month Adventure Creed
html:
Yahir's late-Nov 2024 personal creed, written ~2 weeks before flying out of china (2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure). Reads as a closing manifesto for the china chapter — love unraveling-deep, take chances early/often, FITFO when shit hits, hold no hate, be uncountably kind. Sister doc to 2024 12 14 departing china and a clear specimen of end of chapter reflection. The single most-cited "manifesto-style" artifact in the vault.

TL;DR

  • 15 inbound citations — concentrated around late-2024 and the post-China integration window.
  • Origin: 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure — written ~2 weeks pre-departure.
  • The creed bundles all of Yahir's load-bearing personal directives into a single artifact: FITFO, magnetic aura, soul as beacon, chosen one frame, non negotiables.
  • The "6 months" framing is definitional — Yahir treats half-year stretches as the natural unit of life-chapter (China = 6 months; Austin landing = subsequent 6 months).
  • Carried into post-China travel-planning (2025 05 20 side quests list, 2025 05 20 side quests list africa antarctica) and the broader China chapter synthesis.

The five core lines

From 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure:

  1. Love unraveling-deep. Don't half-heart relationships in the chapter.
  2. Take chances early and often. Front-load risk; the chapter has a clock.
  3. FITFO when shit hits. Figure It The Fuck Out is the directive when the plan breaks.
  4. Hold no hate. Travel-mode ethics — encounters are short; grudges are wasteful.
  5. Be uncountably kind. Default-generous in tip / time / patience.

Sister artifacts

  • 2024 12 14 departing china — the actual closing of the chapter (creed instantiated, not stated).
  • 2024 08 31 adventure edit aesthetic — the visual/aesthetic counterpart.
  • 2024 07 02 Alt Summer Plan — pre-China alt-plan that uses the same 6-month frame.
  • 2024 06 04 non negotiables for traveling — preparatory framework deployed alongside the creed.

Far-back precursors

  • 2021-08-26 → 2021-08-31 — Peru chapter (2021 08 26 bus ride to cusco, 2021 08 31 seize the day machu picchu prep) carries the same disposition without the formal creed-name.
  • 2022-07-31 — 2022 07 31 thing while in vietnam — Vietnam-trip iteration.
  • 2023-12-22 — 2023 12 22 build something — proto-creed for the build-side equivalent.
